role: MCP integration layer that exposes ArchSpine's introspection, scanning, drift detection, and dependency graph features as callable tools and resources for AI agents.
responsibility: Provides an MCP server bootstrap, tool definitions, resource handlers, context-gating state machine, and setup utilities to allow IDEs and AI agents to query project baseline, sync status, architectural invariants, symbols, dependency graphs, and perform change impact analysis.

children.role: MCP context priming state machine that gates tool invocation based on the current context mode (off, project-first, or search-first).

MCP (Model Context Protocol) server bootstrap that initializes the MCP server instance, registers all request handlers for tools, resources, and prompts, and connects to stdio transport. Serves as the primary entry point for external MCP clients (e.g., IDEs, AI agents) to interact with ArchSpine capabilities.
Infrastructure facade for discovering, resolving, and writing MCP tool configurations for the ArchSpine CLI.
Infrastructure facade providing path sanitization and containment validation for MCP tool file inputs.
MCP tool collection exposing ArchSpine's introspection, scanning, drift detection, and dependency graph capabilities as callable MCP tools for LLM agent integration.
